subcodes.first_line: O My handmaidens! Follow not your idle fancies, but follow rather that which hath come through a manifest Command. Ye are the leaves of My celestial Tree; know ye this truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امائی لاتتبعن الهوی ان اتبعن ما اتی بامر مبین انتن اوراق سدرتی ان اعرفن هذا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @chastisement and requital, @thankfulness; gratitude, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
